variables.defaultValue:
{
  args: {
    label: "Status",
    placeholder: "Select status",
    size: "md",
    options: [
      { label: "Open", value: "open" },
      { label: "In Progress", value: "progress" },
      { label: "Done", value: "done" },
    ],
  },
  render: (args) => ({
    props: args,
    template: `
      <agentjds-input-dropdown
        [label]="label"
        [placeholder]="placeholder"
        [size]="size"
        [options]="options"
        [disabled]="disabled"
        [required]="required"
      ></agentjds-input-dropdown>
    `,
  }),
}
